title: Smoke-Kissed Moroccan Lamb Briouat Fondue-Pot
description: A smoky and savory fondue-pot dish featuring lamb briouats in a vegetable stock base.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring vegetable broth to a simmer.
Add pomegranate molasses and mild smoked paprika. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Fold in cumin seeds and turmeric powder, continue to cook until aromatic, about 5 more minutes.
Season with salt and pepper, taste-test and adjust seasoning as needed.
Sauté minced garlic gently in olive oil to prevent burning, add it into the mixture just before serving.
Divide the lamb briouats evenly among four fondue pots or bowls. Pour the infused vegetable broth over each.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh mint leaves if available.
